item.title: Swift launches blockchain ledger; 17 banks from six continents to pilot tokenized deposit payments for 24/7 cross-border settlement
ESMA opens first coordinated MiCA custody review; national regulators to audit 280 authorized crypto-asset service providers across EU
MiCA full enforcement took effect July 1; roughly 80% of previously registered crypto firms in EU lack required authorization
U.S. stablecoin regulators face July 18 GENIUS Act deadline to finalize implementing rules governing payment stablecoin issuers
SEC added three crypto rulemaking items to July 2026 agenda targeting token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and market structure
Revised CLARITY Act draft expected mid-July as Senate negotiators resolve outstanding disputes before targeted floor vote
KelpDAO rsETH bridge exploited for approximately $293 million after attackers minted counterfeit collateral on lending markets
Drift Protocol lost $285 million after North Korean operatives social-engineered staff to bypass multi-signature controls
H1 2026 crypto hacks totaled $972 million across 207 incidents; North Korean-linked groups accounted for roughly $643 million
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $510 million in net inflows over three sessions, ending a 10-day $2.73 billion outflow streak
Deutsche Bank set to launch regulated crypto custody service in 2026 for institutional clients using Taurus SA technology
Franklin Templeton, JPMorgan, and Apollo expand tokenized asset offerings as NYSE explores dedicated on-chain trading venues
JPMorgan backs U.S. CLARITY Act but warns rushed crypto rulemaking could create market loopholes as Senate races toward July vote
